week.name: codex-orange-book
week.description: Codex 橙皮书：从安装到实战案例的全链路 Codex 使用指南（非官方开源，含可下载 PDF）
week.features: A comprehensive open-source guide covering the full lifecycle of using Codex, from initial installation to practical case studies. It provides structured tutorials and includes a downloadable PDF version for offline reference.
week.applications: Ideal for developers and AI enthusiasts looking to master Codex for various programming tasks and automation workflows.

week.name: zhengxi-views
week.description: 可溯源的郑希(易方达基金经理)投研 Agent Skill——基于他全部公开观点原文 + 有原话佐证的投资方法 + 全市场基金真实数据，能溯源问答、按他框架给基金打分，绝不杜撰。⚠️仅研究学习辅助，不构成投资建议‼️website是郑希主页！
week.features: An AI agent that leverages publicly available investment viewpoints and methodologies from fund manager Zheng Xi. It utilizes real market data to provide traceable answers and quantitative scoring for funds based on his specific investment framework.
week.applications: Useful for financial researchers and investors interested in studying or simulating the investment strategies of professional fund managers.

week.name: birds.cafe
week.features: A web-based platform currently under development, focusing on social or community-driven interactions. It leverages JavaScript to provide an interactive interface for users.
week.applications: Primarily serves as a social space or personal project platform for enthusiasts of niche community websites.

week.name: CWR
week.description: Arma: Cold War Assault Remastered Source Code Repository.
week.features: The official source code repository for the remastered version of the classic tactical shooter Arma: Cold War Assault. It provides developers and modders access to the game engine's core codebase.
week.applications: Used by the gaming community for creating mods, fixing legacy bugs, and understanding the architecture of historical tactical shooters.

week.name: Qwen-AgentWorld
week.description: Qwen-AgentWorld: Language World Models for General Agents
week.features: A framework implementing Language World Models specifically designed for general-purpose AI agents. It aims to bridge the gap between language understanding and complex agentic reasoning in simulated environments.
week.applications: Serves as a research platform for AI engineers working on developing more autonomous and context-aware intelligent agents.

week.name: Good-Badminton
week.features: An AI-powered computer vision system designed to function as a digital 'Hawk-Eye' for badminton matches. It tracks shuttlecock movement and player actions to analyze performance and provide accurate line-call assessments.
week.applications: Designed for badminton players and coaches who want to improve their training through automated analysis and high-tech match supervision.

week.name: wloc
week.description: 修改 Apple 网络定位（gs-loc）返回坐标 · 支持 Surge / Quantumult X / Loon / Stash · 快捷指令一键设置/恢复定位
week.features: A tool that modifies Apple's network location (gs-loc) returns to allow for custom geographic positioning. It supports integration with popular network proxy tools like Surge, Quantumult X, and Loon.
week.applications: Useful for users who need to bypass location restrictions or test location-based services in various geographic regions.

week.name: awesome-evals
week.description: A curated, non-BS library of the best resources for building and evaluating AI agents — papers, blogs, talks, tools, benchmarks. Maintained by BenchFlow.
week.features: A curated, high-quality collection of resources dedicated to the evaluation of AI agents, including research papers, blog posts, benchmarks, and specialized tools. It focuses on practical and proven methodologies rather than hype.
week.applications: An essential resource for AI researchers and engineers aiming to implement rigorous evaluation standards in their agent development projects.

week.name: theeleven
week.description: Eleven autonomous AI agents open live football prop markets on X Layer — custom Uniswap v4 hook, gasless USDT0 staking.
week.features: A system of eleven autonomous AI agents that operate live football prop markets on the X Layer blockchain. It incorporates custom Uniswap v4 hooks and gasless staking mechanisms for USDT0.
week.applications: Demonstrates the intersection of autonomous agents and decentralized finance (DeFi) for automated market prediction and trading.

week.name: AgentSpace
week.description: "AgentSpace: Human + Agents. One Team. One Workspace"
week.features: A unified workspace platform designed to facilitate seamless collaboration between humans and AI agents. It acts as a central hub where human oversight meets autonomous agent execution.
week.applications: Targets teams and individual developers looking to integrate AI agents into their daily production workflows for increased productivity.

week.name: make-look-scanned
week.description: Makes PDFs look scanned (CLI or in the browser via WASM)

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

week.features: A utility that transforms digital PDF documents to appear as if they were physically scanned, adding textures and visual imperfections. It is available as a CLI tool and a WASM-based browser application.
week.applications: Perfect for users who need to provide digital documents that require a 'scanned' aesthetic for compliance or stylistic purposes.

week.name: claude-status-bar
week.description: A tiny macOS menu bar status indicator for Claude Code: animated icons, elapsed timer, and open/close lifecycle.
week.features: A lightweight macOS menu bar utility that provides real-time status indicators for Claude Code. It features animated icons, an elapsed timer, and lifecycle management for the background process.
week.applications: Designed for developers using Claude Code who want a quick, non-intrusive way to monitor their agent's activity and status from the menu bar.

month.name: odysseus

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

month.features: A self-hosted workspace designed specifically for AI-powered development. It provides a localized environment to ensure data privacy while utilizing advanced AI workflows.
month.applications: Ideal for developers who need a private, self-managed infrastructure to integrate AI coding assistants into their personal or professional projects.

month.name: ponytail
month.description: Makes your AI agent think like the laziest senior dev in the room. The best code is the code you never wrote.
month.features: An AI agent configuration that optimizes for minimal code generation by adopting a 'lazy senior developer' philosophy. It prioritizes reusing existing code and simplicity over complex or redundant implementations.
month.applications: Useful for developers looking to reduce technical debt and avoid bloat by having an AI agent that favors the most pragmatic and efficient solutions.

month.name: MiMo-Code
month.description: MiMo Code: Where Models and Agents Co-Evolve
month.features: A collaborative framework that facilitates the co-evolution of AI models and software agents. It focuses on the synergistic development of reasoning capabilities within a codebase.
month.applications: Best for researchers and developers experimenting with advanced agentic architectures where the agent and the underlying model learn to improve together.

month.name: Unlimited-OCR
month.description: Unlimited OCR Works: Welcome the Era of One-shot Long-horizon Parsing.
month.features: A high-performance OCR system capable of one-shot, long-horizon document parsing. It aims to eliminate traditional limitations in data extraction accuracy and document length.
month.applications: Suitable for companies and developers needing to automate the ingestion and parsing of massive or complex multi-page documents with high precision.

month.name: book
month.description: The canonical reference for Astrid OS: kernel, capsules, host ABI, the bus, and the security model.
month.features: Provides the comprehensive technical reference for Astrid OS, covering its kernel architecture, host ABI, and unique bus security model. It serves as the definitive source of truth for the system's internal operations.
month.applications: Required reading for kernel developers and system engineers who are building upon or contributing to the Astrid OS platform.

month.name: handbook
month.description: How to work on Astrid: the polyrepo, the kernel-is-dumb law, the RFC trigger, contribution tiers, and the release process.
month.features: Outlines the collaborative workflows, contribution tiers, and release management processes for Astrid OS. It explicitly defines policies like the 'kernel-is-dumb' law to ensure project maintainability.
month.applications: Essential for prospective contributors looking to understand the administrative and development rules governing the Astrid OS project.

month.name: improve
month.description: Use your most capable model to audit your codebase and write plans for cheaper models to execute.
month.features: Leverages high-end, capable AI models to audit existing codebases and generate actionable implementation plans. These plans are then executed by smaller, more cost-effective models.
month.applications: Perfect for engineering teams looking to refactor or improve their codebases while optimizing costs by balancing model performance with inference expenses.

month.name: PixelRAG
month.description: The end of web parsing. The beginning of scalable pixel-native search.
month.features: A pixel-native search and retrieval system that replaces traditional text-based web parsing. It allows for scalable information extraction directly from visual data.
month.applications: Used for advanced data scraping and search applications where traditional DOM-based parsing fails to capture visual layout or non-textual information.

month.name: chinese-buy-us-stock-guide
month.features: Provides a comprehensive guide for Chinese-speaking users on how to invest in the United States stock market. It details account registration, regulatory compliance, and essential investment concepts.
month.applications: Useful for individual investors who are looking to diversify their portfolio by entering the US stock market.

month.name: omnigent
month.description: Omnigent is an open-source AI agent framework and meta-harness: orchestrate Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Pi, and custom agents — swap harnesses without rewriting, enforce policies and sandboxing, and collaborate in real time from any device.
month.features: A meta-harness framework that allows for the orchestration and swapping of various AI agents like Claude Code and Cursor. It enforces unified security policies and sandboxing across different environments.
month.applications: Ideal for enterprises or power users who need to manage multiple AI coding tools and agents from a single, centralized control plane.

month.name: lottie
month.description: Generate production-ready Lottie animations with Claude Code or Codex
month.features: Enables the generation of production-ready Lottie animations using AI agents like Claude Code or Codex. It translates natural language prompts into high-quality vector animations.
month.applications: Great for UI/UX designers and front-end developers who want to rapidly prototype and integrate complex animations without manual coding.

month.name: Void-Tools-v2.0
month.description: Python terminal multitool — OSINT, Discord, web & network utilities. Rich TUI, 13 themes, remote updates. Educational use only.
month.features: A comprehensive Python-based command-line multitool offering a rich terminal user interface (TUI) for OSINT, networking, and web utility tasks. It features multiple themes and support for remote updates.
month.applications: Designed for security researchers and educational purposes to perform information gathering and network analysis within a unified CLI environment.

three_months.name: claw-code
three_months.description: An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.
three_months.features: An agent-managed museum exhibit built with Rust. It is designed to be self-sustaining and maintained entirely without human intervention.
three_months.applications: Suitable for demonstrating autonomous software maintenance and automated exhibit management.

three_months.name: awesome-design-md
three_months.description: A collection of DESIGN.md files analysis by popular brand design systems. Drop one into your project and let coding agents generate a matching UI.
three_months.features: A curated repository of DESIGN.md files derived from top-tier brand design systems. It allows coding agents to interpret these specifications to generate matching UI components.
three_months.applications: Ideal for developers who want to streamline UI generation by providing AI agents with standardized design guidelines.

three_months.name: odysseus

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

three_months.features: A private, self-hosted workspace powered by artificial intelligence. It focuses on providing a secure and controlled environment for AI-driven productivity.
three_months.applications: Designed for privacy-conscious users and developers who need a dedicated, local AI workspace for their projects.

three_months.name: caveman
three_months.description: 🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman
three_months.features: A custom skill for Claude Code that optimizes token usage by utilizing a highly compressed, simplistic linguistic style. It claims to reduce token consumption by approximately 65%.
three_months.applications: Perfect for power users looking to save on API costs and reduce latency in LLM interactions.

three_months.name: graphify
three_months.description: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.
three_months.features: A versatile AI coding assistant tool that converts various file formats, including code, schemas, and media, into a queryable knowledge graph. It provides a unified view of application code, databases, and infrastructure.
three_months.applications: Useful for software architects and engineers who need to visualize and query the complex relationships across their entire tech stack.

three_months.name: open-design
three_months.description: 🎨 Local-first, open-source Claude Design alternative. 🖥️ Native desktop app. ⚡ 259+ Skills · ✨ 142+ Design Systems 🖼️ Web · desktop · mobile prototypes · slides · images · videos · HyperFrames 📦 Sandboxed preview · HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export 🤖 Claude Code / OpenClaw / Codex / Cursor / OpenCode / Qwen / Copilot / Hermes / Kimi & 17+ CLIs.
three_months.features: A local-first, open-source desktop application that serves as an alternative to Claude Design. It supports over 259 skills, numerous design systems, and integrates with multiple CLI tools for cross-platform prototyping.
three_months.applications: Great for designers and developers who want a feature-rich, open-source environment for prototyping and multi-format content export.

three_months.name: ponytail
three_months.description: Makes your AI agent think like the laziest senior dev in the room. The best code is the code you never wrote.
three_months.features: An AI agent utility designed to simulate the decision-making patterns of a pragmatic, minimalist senior developer. It prioritizes efficiency and avoids unnecessary code complexity.
three_months.applications: Best for developers who want their AI assistants to advocate for simplicity and maintainability in their codebase.

three_months.name: mempalace
three_months.description: The best-benchmarked open-source AI memory system. And it's free.
three_months.features: A free, open-source AI memory system that provides standardized benchmarking. It is engineered to improve the long-term context retention of AI agents.
three_months.applications: Used by developers building AI applications that require robust, reliable, and persistent memory capabilities.

three_months.name: career-ops
three_months.description: AI-powered job search system built on Claude Code. 14 skill modes, Go dashboard, PDF generation, batch processing.
three_months.features: An AI-powered job search management system built on Claude Code. It features 14 distinct skill modes, a dashboard for progress tracking, and automated PDF generation.
three_months.applications: Intended for job seekers who want to automate and optimize their search process using agentic workflows.

three_months.name: openclaude
three_months.features: A highly portable TypeScript framework designed to operate in any environment. Its primary strength is its ability to interface with a wide range of external tools and services.
three_months.applications: A flexible base for developers who need an adaptable and framework-agnostic AI agent tool.

three_months.name: nuwa-skill
three_months.description: 你想蒸馏的下一个员工，何必是同事。蒸馏任何人的思维方式——心智模型、决策启发式、表达DNA。Distill how anyone thinks.
three_months.features: A system designed to distill and replicate individual human thought processes, decision-making heuristics, and communication patterns. It captures the 'mental DNA' of an expert.
three_months.applications: Useful for knowledge management, personal productivity, and creating specialized AI models based on specific human expertise.

three_months.name: DeepSeek-Reasonix
three_months.description: DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for your terminal. Engineered around prefix-cache stability — leave it running.
three_months.features: A DeepSeek-native AI coding agent optimized for terminal-based workflows. It leverages prefix-cache stability to ensure high performance and consistent behavior during long-running processes.
three_months.applications: Ideal for developers who prefer terminal-centric AI assistance and require high-performance, long-running coding agents.

year.name: openclaw
year.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
year.features: A cross-platform personal AI assistant designed to function across various operating systems. It emphasizes a unique, lobster-themed workflow for managing automation tasks.
year.applications: Ideal for users looking for a versatile and unconventional AI-driven assistant that integrates seamlessly into different computing environments.

year.name: superpowers
year.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
year.features: A comprehensive framework and methodology focused on building agentic skills. It provides a structured approach to agent development and execution.
year.applications: Suitable for software engineers and developers aiming to standardize and enhance the performance of their AI agents through a proven methodology.

year.name: ECC
year.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
year.features: An optimization system for agent harnesses, focusing on memory, security, and research-first development. It supports integration with popular coding assistants like Claude Code and Cursor.
year.applications: Best for developers who want to improve the reliability, security, and performance of their existing AI coding tools and agents.

year.name: hermes-agent
year.description: The agent that grows with you
year.features: An adaptive AI agent designed to grow and evolve alongside the user. It leverages sophisticated logic to provide increasingly personalized assistance over time.
year.applications: Perfect for users who need a long-term AI companion that learns from their specific needs and adapts to their evolving workflow.

year.name: claw-code
year.description: An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.
year.features: An autonomous, agent-managed project built in Rust that maintains itself without human intervention. It serves as a practical showcase for fully automated software development.
year.applications: Useful for exploring the frontiers of autonomous coding and understanding how self-maintaining software systems can be architected.

year.name: andrej-karpathy-skills
year.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
year.features: A configuration-based project utilizing a single CLAUDE.md file to refine AI behavior. It implements strategies derived from Andrej Karpathy's expert observations on coding pitfalls.
year.applications: Targeted at power users of Claude Code who wish to improve their model's reasoning and reduce common coding errors through better prompts.

year.name: skills
year.features: An official public repository containing a library of standardized skills for AI agents. It provides reusable components to extend agent capabilities.
year.applications: Designed for developers building on Anthropic's ecosystem who need verified, high-quality skill modules to expand their agents' functionalities.

year.name: skills
year.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
year.features: A curated collection of specialized skills designed for professional engineers. It provides direct, highly practical configurations for use in developer environments.
year.applications: Recommended for professional software developers looking for battle-tested configurations to enhance their AI coding assistant's daily output.

year.name: gstack
year.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA
year.features: A collection of 23 opinionated tools mirroring Garry Tan's personal Claude Code setup. It includes agents specialized in roles like CEO, Designer, and QA.
year.applications: Useful for individuals or small teams wanting to replicate an elite, multi-disciplinary agent setup to manage various aspects of product development.

year.name: agency-agents
year.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
year.features: A suite of specialized AI agents, each with unique personalities and workflows for different professional tasks. It covers functions ranging from frontend development to community management.
year.applications: Ideal for businesses or individuals needing a versatile team of AI experts to handle diverse operational tasks efficiently.

year.name: spec-kit
year.description: 💫 Toolkit to help you get started with Spec-Driven Development
year.features: A toolkit specifically designed to streamline the implementation of Specification-Driven Development. It simplifies the process of creating and validating project specifications.
year.applications: Useful for teams aiming to improve code quality and alignment by ensuring development is strictly driven by clear, actionable specifications.

year.name: cc-switch
year.description: A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, OpenClaw, Gemini CLI & Hermes Agent. Only official website: ccswitch.io
year.features: A cross-platform desktop application that provides a unified interface for multiple AI coding tools. It supports platforms like Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Hermes Agent.
year.applications: Great for power users who frequently switch between different AI coding agents and want a single, centralized dashboard to manage them.

audio_video.name: graphify
audio_video.description: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.
audio_video.features: This AI assistant plugin transforms diverse project files like code, SQL schemas, and media into a unified, queryable knowledge graph. It offers an integrated view of application code, database structures, and infrastructure.
audio_video.applications: Ideal for developers and architects who need to navigate complex codebases and infrastructure relationships through natural language queries.

audio_video.name: open-design
audio_video.description: 🎨 Local-first, open-source Claude Design alternative. 🖥️ Native desktop app. ⚡ 259+ Skills · ✨ 142+ Design Systems 🖼️ Web · desktop · mobile prototypes · slides · images · videos · HyperFrames 📦 Sandboxed preview · HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export 🤖 Claude Code / OpenClaw / Codex / Cursor / OpenCode / Qwen / Copilot / Hermes / Kimi & 17+ CLIs.
audio_video.features: A local-first, open-source design application that supports hundreds of design systems and AI integrations. It provides a native desktop environment for prototyping across web, mobile, and video formats.
audio_video.applications: Perfect for designers and developers looking for an open-source alternative to proprietary design tools with advanced AI-powered automation.

audio_video.name: OpenMontage
audio_video.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

audio_video.features: An agentic video production system featuring over 500 agent skills and 12 specialized pipelines. It effectively converts AI coding assistants into fully automated video editing studios.
audio_video.applications: Used by content creators and automated production teams to streamline large-scale video editing and production workflows.

audio_video.name: video-use
audio_video.features: A specialized tool that enables coding agents to manipulate and edit video content directly. It streamlines the programmatic control of video processing tasks.
audio_video.applications: Useful for developers building automated video processing pipelines or AI agents that perform creative video editing operations.

audio_video.name: palmier-pro
audio_video.description: macOS video editor built for AI
audio_video.features: A macOS-native video editing application specifically engineered for AI-assisted workflows. It provides a seamless interface for modern AI-driven video content creation.
audio_video.applications: Designed for professional video editors who want to leverage AI capabilities within a high-performance native desktop application.

audio_video.name: OmniVoice
audio_video.description: High-Quality Voice Cloning TTS for 600+ Languages
audio_video.features: A powerful high-quality text-to-speech engine capable of voice cloning across more than 600 languages. It prioritizes linguistic diversity and high-fidelity speech synthesis.
audio_video.applications: Useful for global application developers who need multilingual support and realistic voice synthesis features.

audio_video.name: OmniVoice-Studio
audio_video.description: The open-source ElevenLabs alternative for local voice cloning, design, create, dubbing and dictation Desktop App
audio_video.features: An open-source desktop application providing local voice cloning, dubbing, and dictation tools. It serves as a privacy-focused alternative to services like ElevenLabs.
audio_video.applications: Ideal for podcasters, voice actors, and media professionals who need local, cost-effective voice production capabilities.

audio_video.name: reclip
audio_video.description: Download videos from almost any website. Lightweight, self-hosted media downloader with a clean web UI.
audio_video.features: A lightweight, self-hosted media downloader that features a clean web interface. It allows users to capture videos from a wide variety of websites with ease.
audio_video.applications: Suitable for users who want a personal, centralized solution for archiving video content across the web.

audio_video.name: MOSS-TTS-Nano
audio_video.description: MOSS-TTS-Nano is an open-source multilingual tiny speech generation model from MOSI.AI and the OpenMOSS team. With only 0.1B parameters, it is designed for realtime speech generation, can run directly on CPU without a GPU, and keeps the deployment stack simple enough for local demos, web serving, and lightweight product integration.
audio_video.features: A tiny 0.1B parameter multilingual speech generation model designed for extreme efficiency. It runs entirely on CPUs, making it suitable for real-time applications and lightweight integrations.
audio_video.applications: Perfect for developers integrating voice features into mobile apps or edge devices where GPU resources are limited.

audio_video.name: html-video
audio_video.description: Programmatic video for coding agents — HTML to video on your laptop. Turn HTML, CSS & data into real MP4s with pluggable render engines, 21 templates, AI soundtrack. Apache-2.0, no per-render fees. An official project by the Open Design team.
audio_video.features: A programmatic rendering engine that converts HTML, CSS, and data into high-quality MP4 videos. It offers pluggable renderers and AI-generated soundtracks without per-render costs.
audio_video.applications: Ideal for programmatic marketing, automated data reporting, and dynamic video generation tasks.

audio_video.name: MisoTTS
audio_video.description: Miso TTS is an 8 billion, highly emotive text-to-speech model
audio_video.features: An 8 billion parameter text-to-speech model focused on delivering highly emotive and expressive voice output. It bridges the gap between robotic speech and human-like emotional nuance.
audio_video.applications: Useful for game developers, audiobook creators, and virtual assistants requiring high-quality, emotionally resonant narration.

audio_video.name: claude-video
audio_video.description: Give Claude the ability to watch any video. /watch downloads, extracts frames, transcribes, hands it all to Claude.
audio_video.features: An integration tool that allows Claude to analyze video content by automatically downloading files, extracting frames, and generating transcriptions. It provides Claude with the context needed to discuss visual media.
audio_video.applications: Great for researchers or developers who need to automate the analysis, summarization, or query-answering of long-form video content.
